title: gentiana wardii subsp. wardii
intro: Gentiana wardii subsp. wardii, also known as the Ward's gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to southwestern China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gentiana wardii subsp. wardii include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Gentiana wardii subsp. wardii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
